description_long: This is a robust urban security fence composed of a thick, solid concrete wall panel flanked by two vertical metal posts. The upper edge of the fence is topped with angled metal brackets supporting two taut strands of barbed wire, providing an additional deterrent against climbing. The concrete surface is textured and dark gray, showing subtle weathering and a slightly rough finish, while the metal posts and brackets have a darker, rusted appearance. The barbed wire is thin and metallic, running horizontally and spaced evenly above the main wall. The overall construction suggests a heavy, immovable barrier designed for high-security environments such as industrial perimeters, restricted zones, or urban infrastructure. There are no visible openings, gates, or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian and defensive purpose.
description: A heavy concrete and metal security fence with barbed wire on top, designed for urban perimeter protection. The structure is solid, weathered, and utilitarian, with no decorative features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the concrete wall and the angled metal brackets holding the barbed wire.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the wide, textured concrete panel flanked by dark metal posts and topped with two strands of barbed wire.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the thickness and bracket structure seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to the front, showing the concrete panel, metal posts, and barbed wire, with no visible openings or features.
